actions.value: If you would like to get direct assistance regarding your Thorchain Savers Stake, or any Thorchain swaps, you may reach their #support-desk from the main THORSwap Discord server, located here: https://discord.gg/thorswap - they may be able to provide better insights into any errors that occur while using Thorchain protocols/dapps and be able to recommend the best remedy for the situation.

If you would like to get direct assistance regarding your Thorchain Savers Stake, or any Thorchain swaps, you may reach their #support-desk from the main THORSwap Discord server, located here: https://discord.gg/thorswap - they may be able to provide better insights into any errors that occur while using Thorchain protocols/dapps and be able to recommend the best remedy for the situation.
